key_decisions.original_text: Glamsterdam devnet-5 abandoned; devnet-6 relaunch targeting Wednesday with same spec
EIP-7688 (stable containers) to be considered for glamsterdam-devnet-7 or devnet-8, pending EPBS devnet stability
key_decisions.context: to be considered for devnet-7 or devnet-8 once EPBS devnet is stable

key_decisions.original_text: EIP-7997: support voiced for Option 2 — enshrine Arachnid at known address in Genesis; EIP or 7997 modification to follow
key_decisions.context: support voiced for Option 2 - enshrine Arachnid at known address in Genesis
